message:
feat(recorder): replace IndexerConfig data_path with RecorderSourceDescriptor

Adds RecorderSourceDescriptor enum (AppendLog/FrankenSqlite) to recorder_storage.rs.
IndexerConfig now uses `source` field instead of `data_path`. Adds create_event_reader()
factory method, data_path() accessor, and 7 new descriptor tests. Updates all callers
across source and test files.

Closes ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.2.1.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
